title: PearlCraft
body:
**PearlCraft is a lightweight datapack that adds a recipe to craft Ender Pearls.**

### Why these materials?
  Snowballs - Throwable projectile.\
  Chorus Fruit - Teleports you!\
  Ghast Tear - Acts as a difficulty layer.

### Why use this datapack?
  PearlCraft makes it so that you don't have to make an Enderman farm to get Ender Pearls, instead you can craft them using Chorus Fruit, Snowball, and Ghast Tear. Plus Enderman farms may get laggy, so you don't have to lag anymore with this datapack.

### Compatibility: 
  This datapack only adds a recipe. It should work with most datapacks unless 
  they also use the same name.

### Problems?
  Contact me on discord on my server.

### Installation (Datapack): 
####  Download the datapack.
####  Place it in the world's datapacks folder.
####  Run /reload or restart the world.
![The Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cb83687e47fbf4bda6ed9a5fe0a09f5afc90b57.png)
